description: Valid G2 URL for a product with 100+ reviews
expected_behavior: Calls automation-lab~g2-scraper with the Notion G2 URL
Fetches at least 20 reviews
Produces all 6 battlecard sections: top_pros, top_cons, switching_reasons, buyer_objections, discovery_questions, positioning_opportunity
Every theme in top_pros and top_cons has review_count >= 2
All 5 discovery questions are open-ended
Output saved to docs/competitive-intel/notion-[date].md
expected_output: Full battlecard with 6 sections, verbatim quotes, saved file path shown

description: Valid Capterra URL triggers correct actor
expected_behavior: Detects capterra.com in URL
Calls epctex~capterra-scraper (not the G2 actor)
Maps Capterra field names: benefits -> pros, drawbacks -> cons
Produces full battlecard output
expected_output: Full battlecard using Capterra data, correct actor used

expected_behavior: Apify returns 0 or < 5 reviews
Skill stops immediately after Step 3
Tells user: 'Could not fetch enough reviews. Check that the URL points to a product reviews page'
Provides correct URL format guidance for G2 and Capterra
Does NOT attempt Gemini analysis on empty data
expected_output: Graceful stop with URL format guidance, no partial battlecard generated

expected_behavior: Step 1 setup check detects missing APIFY_API_TOKEN
Stops immediately
Tells user: 'APIFY_API_TOKEN is required to scrape G2/Capterra. Get it at console.apify.com/account/integrations. Free tier includes enough credits for ~50 runs.'
Does NOT attempt any scraping
expected_output: Immediate stop at Step 1 with exact setup instructions including the URL to get the token

description: Gemini returns truncated or invalid JSON on first attempt
expected_behavior: First Gemini call returns invalid JSON or empty response
Skill retries once with maxOutputTokens reduced to 2048
If retry succeeds: presents full battlecard
If retry also fails: presents whatever partial output was returned, marks missing sections with [INCOMPLETE]
Tells user: 'Gemini analysis was incomplete. Partial results shown below. Try again with a smaller review set.'
expected_output: Either full battlecard from retry, or partial battlecard with [INCOMPLETE] markers and clear user message
